title: Senior Financial Analyst - Angel One Ventures Solutions - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Angel One Ventures Solutions - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Angel One Ventures Solutions! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Thane team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Angel One Ventures Solutions:
Angel One Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Angel One Ventures Solutions!
